plays.playDescription: This is the second time in club history the Cowboys have played an overtime game on Thanksgiving Day. The first OT game was a 44-38 loss to Minnesota on Nov. 26, 1987. B.Cundiff kicks 65 yards from DAL 30 to DEN 5. Da.Williams to DEN 32 for 27 yards (N.Jones). Return middle.
